zh.Alwoodley, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾阿爾武德利
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Gascoigne Sr.於大約1309年出生在英國越可爾希亞活時，他的父親William Gascoigne61歲，母親Maud Gawthorpe47歲。他於大約1343年與Agnes Frank在英國越可爾阿爾武德利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1378年12月7日之前在英國越可爾加福索普。

zh-hans.Wainfleet, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾維艾音福利特
zh-hans.of Harewood, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾希亞活
zh-hans.Alwoodley, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾阿爾武德利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Gascoigne Sr.于大约1309年出生在英国越可爾希亞活时，他的父亲William Gascoigne61岁，母亲Maud Gawthorpe47岁。他于大约1343年与Agnes Frank在英国越可爾阿爾武德利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1378年12月7日之前在英国越可爾加福索普。

nameMeanings.name: Gascoigne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Anglo-Norman French Gascon, Middle English Gascoun, Gascon ‘Gascon, native of Gascony’ or the adjective Gascuinz ‘of Gascony’. The name of the region derives from that of the Basques, who are found close by and formerly extended into this region as well; they are first named in Roman sources as Vascōnes, but the original meaning of the name derived from a root eusk- in the non-Indo-European language that they still speak today, is completely obscure. By the Middle Ages the Basques had been displaced from most of Gascony by speakers of Gascon (a dialect of Occitan, related to French), who were proverbial for their boastfulness. In the 11th century Gascony united with Aquitaine and was thus held by England between 1154 and 1453.

variants.name: Gascon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Jaime, Mario, Miguel, Rafael, Ruben, Amado, Ana, Ana Maria, Angel, Caridad.  French Andre, Chantal, Jean-Guy, Jean-Philippe, Monique, Serge, Simonne.
French; Spanish (Gascón): habitational name for someone from the province of Gascony, Old French Gascogne (see Gascoigne ). This surname is also found in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William Gascoigne Sr. was born about 1309, in Harewood, Yorkshire, England, his father, William Gascoigne, was 61 and his mother, Maud Gawthorpe, was 47. He married Agnes Frank about 1343, in Alwoodley, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 7 December 1378, in Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Gascoigne Sr. est né environ 1309, à Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Gascoigne, avait 61 ans et sa mère, Maud Gawthorpe, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Frank environ 1343, à Alwoodley, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 7 décembre 1378, à Gawthorpe, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Gascoigne Sr. um 1309 in Harewood, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Gascoigne 61 und seine Mutter Maud Gawthorpe 47. Er hat um 1343 in Alwoodley, Yorkshire, England Agnes Frank geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 7. Dezember 1378 in Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Gascoigne Sr. è nato il circa 1309 nel Harewood, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, William Gascoigne, aveva 61 anni e il suo madre, Maud Gawthorpe, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Frank circa 1343, nel Alwoodley, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 7 dicembre 1378, nel Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Gascoigne Sr.が約1309年にイギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッドで生まれた時，父William Gascoigneは61歳，母Maud Gawthorpeは47歳であった。約1343年にイギリスヨークシュアイアアルウッドリーでAgnes Frankと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1378年12月7日以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアガウソルペで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Gascoigne Sr.(이)가 대략 1309년 영국 요르크실르 하레우드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Gascoigne(은)는 61세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Gawthorpe(은)는 47세였다. 그는 대략 1343년 영국 요르크실르 알우들리에서 Agnes Frank(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1378년 12월 7일 이전 영국 요르크실르 가w소에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Gascoigne Sr. nasceu aproximadamente 1309, em Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Gascoigne, tinha 61 anos e sua mãe, Maud Gawthorpe, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Frank aproximadamente 1343, em Alwoodley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 7 de dezembro de 1378, em Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Gascoigne Sr. родился около 1309 г. в местности харюуд, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Gascoigne было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Maud Gawthorpe, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Frank около 1343 г. в местности алвудли, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 7 декабрь 1378 г. в местности гавтаурп, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Gascoigne Sr. nació aproximadamente 1309, en Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Gascoigne, tenía 61 años y su mamá, Maud Gawthorpe, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Agnes Frank aproximadamente 1343, en Alwoodley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 7 de diciembre de 1378, en Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
